title: U.S. is right to ask allies to spend more on defense, Dutch deputy PM says
summary_full: Five years ago, the Dutch public wouldn't have supported such an increase in defense spending, she said, but that is not the case after Russia invaded Ukraine.
summary_public: Five years ago, the Dutch public wouldn't have supported such an increase in defense spending, she said, but that is not the case after Russia invaded Ukraine.

NL.label: positive
NL.evidence: Dutch deputy PM says U.S. is right to ask allies to spend more on defense
